items.title: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
items.dek: It comes less than a week after an undocumented migrant was fatally shot in Houston by an immigration agent.

items.title: Identity of Sydney daycare worker facing 329 child abuse offences revealed
items.dek: Hamish Tait is accused of abusing 136 children at five childcare facilities over a 16-year period.
